SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-13-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TEKHIA MCCALL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENAYSIA RABB IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE [HEARING 07/28/23]; REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCALL, TEKHIA AS TO DEFENDANT RABB, DENAYSIA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)

IF PROOF OF SERVICE IS NOT FILED ON THE DEFENDANT, PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE TO SERVE DEFENDANT WITH THE NEW COURT DATE. GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUESTS ARE EXTENDED TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES.
